case_title: GEORGE E. SIBTHORP VS. ARTHUR CINADER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,355.45 FILED BY SIBTHORP, GEORGE E. AS TO DEFENDANT CINADER, ARTHUR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-03-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
